mnemonics.title: Hamming Code Positions
mnemonics.content: Redundant bits sit at positions that are powers of 2 (1,2,4,8...)

mnemonics.title: CRC Steps
mnemonics.content: Divide, Subtract, Append: Divide data by polynomial, subtract remainder, append checksum

acronyms.usage: Used in network frames and storage devices

visualTips.visualization: Imagine even/odd traffic lights - green when bit count matches parity
Visualize parity bits as watchtowers covering specific data bit ranges

analogies.analogy: Like a grocery list total - if received total doesn't match, items are missing
Similar to shuffling a deck of cards to spread out damaged cards
